name: Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Quickly brown the chicken pieces, then transfer them to the crockpot.
3. In the same skillet, combine the remaining ingredients and stir until well blended and heated through.
4. Add the mixture back into the crockpot containing the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 7-8 hours.
6. Serve over spaghetti or hot rice.
